title: rubus × fouilletinus
intro: Rubus × fouilletinus, a hybrid of the common raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis), is a shrub native to Europe and Western Asia, known for its edible fruits and various medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, anti-cancer, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × fouilletinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
